title: GPU vs TPU
content: In the description its mentioned about GPU and CPU timing of notebooks. Are we allowed to use TPU as well. I do have the option of using 5ve-8 ?

comments.content: You can use whatever accelerator you want to train models and save their model weights. (You can also train and save models offline, i.e. not using Kaggle). But when you make a submission notebook, we load our saved model weights, and then we must infer on either GPU or CPU.
